data_scope.include: Iranian ballistic missiles (BM) targeting Israel only
exclude: Hezbollah rockets, missiles, UAVs (tracked separately by Alma — NOT in this dataset)
Iranian Shahed/UAV/drone launches (even Iran-origin — not BM)
Iranian BM targeting non-Israel targets (Gulf states, Saudi Arabia, etc.)
data_scope.note_on_alma_waves: alma_waves_* columns = Iran-origin attack waves toward Israel only (Alma definition). Includes both Iranian BM and Iranian drones/UAVs — NOT ballistic-missile-only. Used as proxy for BM activity, not as a BM count.

project_structure.data/: Primary model inputs — CSV files and data registry (this file)
project_structure.data/archive/: Versioned snapshots of data files before major restructures
project_structure.docs/: Model design documents and methodology (e.g., initial strikes model.docx)
project_structure.reports/: Source PDFs from JINSA, ISW, and other primary sources
project_structure.model/: Python model scripts — NB stochastic model, Z-score monitor, forecasts

primary_files.strikes_israel_daily.csv: PRIMARY model input. One row per day Feb 28–Mar 28. Israel-specific BM data.
primary_files.alma_proxy.csv: Continuous Alma wave series (Iran→Israel proxy). Feb 28–Mar 26.
primary_files.global_splits_daily.csv: JINSA global BM totals + per-country splits (UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait, Iraq). Feb 28–Mar 28.
primary_files.inventory.csv: Iranian BM/launcher stock snapshots by weapon type.
primary_files.events.csv: Confirmed specific BM impact events with location and casualties.
primary_files.sources.csv: Source registry with confidence tiers and access status.

bm_il_cumul_anchors.scope: all_missiles_5-day_Feb28-Mar4; may include small non-BM fraction

phase_i_conflict.description: JINSA Mar5 PDF table gives direct per-day Israel BM counts (73/57/28/20/9 = 187 total) vs BBC/IDF 5-day anchor (~128). Discrepancy = 59 BMs.
phase_i_conflict.resolution: JINSA Mar5 preliminary global counts systematically overcounted vs Mar24 final (Day3: 186→138; Day4: 108→68). Israel-specific numbers likely similarly overcounted ~20-35%. cumul=128 retained as primary anchor; JINSA daily values used as observed upper bounds.
phase_i_conflict.status: unresolved — both values documented in strikes_israel_daily.csv notes

resolved_discrepancies.resolution: All figures internally consistent — different definitions and time windows.

resolved_discrepancies.source: ALMA Mar1 + TIMES_IL (both citing IDF assessment)

resolved_discrepancies.resolution: 438 = global (JINSA final). Israel Day1 = 73 (JINSA Mar5 preliminary). 5-day cumul at Israel = ~128 (BBC/IDF anchor). Conflict unresolved — see phase_i_conflict.
40 = mid-day snapshot (JINSA 3/24 PDF as of 11am ET). 46 = final day count (JINSA 3/25 PDF confirmed). Use 46 as final.
